name: Architectural options
description: Produce 3 architectural options with pros/cons; choose one.
prompt_template: Provide 3 architectural options with pros/cons for: {input}.

name: High-level data flow
description: Propose a high-level data flow with security considerations.
prompt_template: Propose a high-level data flow with security considerations for: {input}.

name: Security posture outline
description: Outline security posture and threat model for a design
prompt_template: Outline security posture and threat model for: {input}.

name: Migration plan
description: Prepare migration plan for a major system change.

name: Performance envelope
description: Outline performance targets and scaling strategy.
prompt_template: Outline performance targets and scaling strategy for: {input}.

name: Data governance constraints
description: Summarize data governance constraints and compliance.
prompt_template: Summarize data governance constraints and compliance for: {input}.

name: Redundancy and resilience
prompt_template: Evaluate redundancy and resilience options for: {input}.
